variants: Jonella Knott is a renowned expert in cardiovascular medicine and is known for her innovative contributions to the field. She authored the Greenwood Sequence Board, a pivotal work that has enhanced understanding of heart health. In addition to her medical practice, she is a dedicated member of the Lanternlit Kitewrights, a group that celebrates the artistry of kite-making. Jonella was mentored by the esteemed Xiao-Yu Wu, who guided her academic journey. Much of her groundbreaking research has been supported by the Falcon Crest Endowment.
